name: Velocity (Planned vs Completed Story Points)
description: Last 10 sprints planned versus completed story points
query:
WITH sprint_velocity AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(sprints.name, v_facts.entity_id, v_facts.full_date::text) AS sprint_name,
        MAX(v_facts.full_date) AS sprint_date,
        SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'velocity_planned_sp' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END) AS planned_story_points,
        SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'velocity_completed_sp' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END) AS completed_story_points
    FROM metrics.v_facts
    LEFT JOIN clean_jira.sprints ON v_facts.entity_id = sprints.id::text AND v_facts.entity_type = 'sprint'
    WHERE v_facts.calc_code IN ('velocity_planned_sp', 'velocity_completed_sp')
      [[AND {{project_key}}]]
      [[AND {{date_range}}]]
      [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
      [[AND {{sprint_name}}]]
      [[ AND sprints.start_date::date >= {{sprint_start_date}} ]]
    GROUP BY COALESCE(sprints.name, v_facts.entity_id, v_facts.full_date::text)
)
SELECT sprint_name, planned_story_points, completed_story_points
FROM (
    SELECT sprint_name, planned_story_points, completed_story_points, sprint_date
    FROM sprint_velocity
    ORDER BY sprint_date DESC NULLS LAST
    LIMIT 10
) last_10
ORDER BY sprint_date ASC NULLS LAST
